title: Incident Timeline Rebuild
subtitle: Reconstructing incident timelines overloads OLTP systems
objective: Route timeline generation through async workers and archival storage paths.
constraints: Do not block APIs for timeline rebuilds

concepts.title: Async Timeline Generation
concepts.description: Timeline jobs should flow API -> queue -> worker.

concepts.title: Artifact Storage
concepts.description: Generated timelines should be written to blob storage.

concepts.title: Metadata Index
concepts.description: Index timeline metadata in database for search.
